remember: Recall the different types of digestive enzymes and their functions.
List the major organs of the digestive system and their functions.
Describe the process of mechanical and chemical digestion in the mouth, pharynx, esophagus, stomach, and small intestine.
Identify the nutrients absorbed in the small intestine and the role of villi and microvilli.
understand: Explain the role of pH and temperature in enzyme activity.
Describe the process of emulsification and its importance in digestion.
Discuss the role of hormones in regulating digestion and absorption.
Understand the importance of digestion and absorption in overall health.
apply: Describe the process of digestion and absorption of a specific nutrient (e.g. carbohydrates, proteins, fats).
Explain the role of digestive enzymes in breaking down a specific type of food.
Design an experiment to investigate the effect of pH on enzyme activity.
Develop a treatment plan for a patient with a digestive disorder (e.g. celiac disease, lactose intolerance).
analyze: Compare and contrast the digestive systems of different organisms (e.g. humans, plants, animals).
Evaluate the importance of digestion and absorption in maintaining overall health.
Analyze the impact of dietary choices on digestion and absorption.
Compare the efficiency of different digestion and absorption processes.

ncert_objectives: To describe the process of digestion in humans, including mechanical and chemical digestion.
To explain the role of different organs and enzymes in digestion.
To describe the process of absorption in the small intestine.
To explain the importance of digestion and absorption in maintaining overall health.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the process of digestion in the mouth, pharynx, esophagus, stomach, and small intestine.
To explain the role of digestive enzymes and hormones in regulating digestion and absorption.
To describe the process of absorption in the small intestine and the role of villi and microvilli.
To explain the importance of digestion and absorption in maintaining overall health.
